condition.displayPlaceholder: e.g. Essential hypertension, Type 2 diabetes mellitus

validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.birthDatePast: Birth date must be in the past
validation.documentMin: Document must be at least 11 characters
validation.reasonMin: Reason must be at least 3 characters
validation.rangeError: Value out of acceptable range (HR: 0-300, Temp: 30-45, BP: 0-300)
validation.reportTitleMin: Report title must be at least 3 characters
validation.conclusionMin: Conclusion must be at least 5 characters
validation.icdCodeMin: ICD-10 code must be at least 3 characters
validation.icdFormat: Invalid ICD-10 format. e.g. I10, E11.9
validation.icdDisplayMin: Diagnosis description must be at least 3 characters
validation.allergenCodeMin: Allergen code must be at least 3 characters
validation.allergenDisplayMin: Allergen description must be at least 3 characters
validation.reactionMin: Reported reaction must be at least 3 characters
validation.medicationMin: Medication name must be at least 3 characters
validation.dosageMin: Dosage instruction must be at least 3 characters
